concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: A massive block of text from the bottom half of Source Page 14 is entirely missing from the output. After extracting item '(f) White Oak River', the output encounters an extraction error/artifact and completely skips the remainder of the page. This causes the omission of subsections (i), (ii), (g), (h) [including i, ii, iii], (i), and the heading and start of '(13) New River Area'. The text picks back up abruptly with the first word of Source Page 15.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: (i) Pettiford Creek - east of a line beginning on the north shore... [Text continues through] ...running along the IWW near Cedar Point to a
concerns.output_quote: The text abruptly cuts off after the extraction artifact on page 13 JSON and resumes on page 15 JSON with: "point 34° 33.1860' N - 77° 20.4370' W; running northerly to a point on the shoreline..."

concerns.analysis: The extraction output contains massive duplication and leaked AI internal monologue. In the 'In the Pungo River Area:' list item (spanning pages 3/4), the entire block of text from '(a) Fortescue Creek' down to '(viii) Runway Creek' is repeated verbatim 8 times. Additionally, on page 13/14 under the 'Bogue Sound' section, the text for item '(f) White Oak River' is duplicated multiple times alongside leaked AI extraction monologue ('child elements follow below structure if requested in same text
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 4: '(a) Fortescue Creek: (i) Headwaters... (viii) Runway Creek...'; Page 14: '(f) White Oak River - northwest of a line...'
concerns.output_quote: The JSON contains the combined block '(a) Fortescue Creek:- southeast of a line beginning... (viii) Runway Creek...' repeated 8 times. It also contains '(f) White Oak River...' repeated 3 times with injected text like 'Wait, extracting properly into children array as seen below -> no text string modification here...'
concerns.location: Pages 3-4 (In the Pungo River Area array) and Pages 13-14 (Bogue Sound - Bogue Inlet Area array)
